scripts.check: node --check server.mjs && node --check hub/static/app.js && node --check hub/static/flow-background.js && node --check scripts/gui-smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/ark-service.mjs && node --check scripts/local-llm-check.mjs && node --check scripts/session-hide-check.mjs && node scripts/control-parser-check.mjs && node scripts/local-llm-check.mjs && node scripts/session-hide-check.mjs && ARK_SELF_CHECK=trusted-remote node server.mjs && ARK_SELF_CHECK=core node server.mjs && node scripts/ark-service.mjs unit >/dev/null
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run gui-smoke
